articles.description: Maa Inti Bangaaram continues to impress at the box office. After a solid Day 8 performance, Samantha Ruth Prabhu's latest release is expected to register another big jump on Day 9 because of the weekend boost and positive response.

articles.title: Why K Bhagyaraj earned the title ‘Thirai Kathai Mannan’ — Tamil cinema’s screenplay king
articles.description: K Bhagyaraj's films proved compelling screenplays could outshine spectacle, earning him the title 'Thirai Kathai Mannan' in Tamil cinema.

articles.title: Nijiro Murakami Assault Case: Punishment, Possible Jail, Impact On Alice In Borderland Actor's Career If Found Guilty
articles.description: Japanese actor Nijiro Murakami, known for Netflix's Alice in Borderland, is facing allegations of assault after prosecutors reportedly accused him of harming his former girlfriend. The case has drawn attention due to a possible jail term.

articles.title: Bollywood stars who follow the early dinner rule for fitness
articles.description: Health often becomes a crucial subject when one is affected by sickness. However, many celebrities who work continuously for hours on film sets have advocated for fitness and improved mobility over many years. One of the most important rituals Bollywood stars follow religiously is eating before 7 pm. Prioritising a stable lifestyle, the actors consume their last meal by the evening and close kitchen chores before night. From Anushka Sharma to Malaika Arora, let’s take a look at the Bollywood celebrities who advocate for having dinner as a fitness practice.

articles.title: 'Manichitrathazhu scared me for days': Tovino Thomas on growing up watching films
articles.description: Actor Tovino Thomas has shared how his family's tradition of watching movies inspired his passion for cinema. Promoting Balan: The Boy, Tovino recalled being scared after watching Manichitrathazhu as a child

articles.title: Maurya Siddavaram and Tanvi Aakanksha's film JOKER under Meera Productions officially launched
articles.description: Meera Productions' maiden venture, JOKER starring Maurya Siddavaram and Tanvi Aakanksha in the lead roles, was formally launched on Saturday with traditional pooja ceremonies. The event took place at Ramanaidu Studios in Hyderabad and was attended by several prominent personalities from the Telugu film industry. The event was graced by big celebrities. Ace producer Allu Aravind sounded the clap for the inaugural shot, while Allu Sneha switched on the camera. Young producer Bunny Vas handed over the script, marking the official launch of the project. Speaking on the occasion, producer Sandeep Ramineni (Sandy) said , "This is the first production from our banner and it is being made as a complete entertainer. Director Geetha C. Shekhar has crafted a script that blends fun-filled entertainment with an emotional touch. Maurya and Tanvi make a charming on-screen pair, and we are confident they will impress audiences. We plan to begin the regular shoot in August, and details about the remaining cast and technical crew will be announced soon." Cast : Maurya Siddavaram, Tanvi Aakanksha & Others Technical Crew: Banner: Meera Productions Producer: Sandeep Ramineni (Sandy) Director: Geetha C. Shekhar Cinematography: Suresh Raguthu
articles.source: Latest Movie Updates, Film News, Movie Reviews,pre

articles.title: Quote of the day by Meg Cabot: 'As you age, you lose friends. With luck, you'll be able to hang on to your true friends. Because friends like that are more precious than all the tiaras in the world' - A timeless lesson on friendship by The Princess Diaries author
articles.description: Author Meg Cabot's memorable quote from The Princess Diaries reminds us that as we grow older, some friendships naturally fade. But the true friends who stay through every phase of life are priceless. Their love, loyalty and support are worth far more than money, fame or any material possession. Read on to know why it still feels relatable.

articles.title: Elizabeth Banks says ‘Wet Hot American Summer’ changed her life as film turns 25
articles.description: Celebrating a quarter-century of 'Wet Hot American Summer,' Elizabeth Banks is hosting an anniversary reunion in Los Angeles on August 8, inviting fans to join her for the fun. The film, which debuts again in theaters on August 14, initially faced box office challenges but ultimately carved out a niche as a cult classic.

articles.description: Naomi Osaka has left fans smiling after reacting to Taylor Townsend’s latest social media post ahead of the 2026 Wimbledon Championships. Townsend recently revealed her fresh bob hairstyle in a fun Instagram Reel. The post quickly caught the attention of Osaka, who joined the comment section with a playful response.

articles.title: K. Bhagyaraj: Tamil cinema’s master of screenplay and storytelling
articles.description: Explore K. Bhagyaraj's impact on Tamil cinema through his masterful screenwriting, storytelling, and signature blend of comedy and music.

articles.title: Remembering K Bhagyaraj through five classic films
articles.description: Renowned Tamil filmmaker K. Bhagyaraj has passed away, leaving behind a rich cinematic legacy. His directorial prowess gifted audiences with numerous hits, including the romantic family drama 'Thooral Ninnu Pochu' and the sensitive exploration of marriage in 'Mouna Geethangal'. He also helmed the gripping crime thriller 'Oru Kaidhiyin Diary' and the successful Bollywood venture 'Aakhree Raasta', showcasing his versatility and impact on Indian cinema.

articles.title: Veteran Tamil filmmaker and actor K Bhagyaraj dies of heart attack at 73
articles.description: Veteran Tamil filmmaker, actor and screenwriter K Bhagyaraj has died of a heart attack in Chennai at the age of 73, leaving behind a lasting cinematic legacy

articles.title: Angelina Jolie vows to 'defeat the case at trial' after Brad Pitt's court win in winery battle
articles.description: The legal showdown between Angelina Jolie and Brad Pitt over Château Miraval escalates as a judge permits Pitt to question executives from the purchasing company. Pitt claims the buyer is tied to a 'Russia-affiliated spirits conglomerate,' which could jeopardize his reputation. In contrast, Jolie's legal team argues the sale was purely business-oriented and eagerly anticipates the trial, downplaying the court's recent decisions.

articles.title: Amid Brad Pitt legal drama, Angelina Jolie gushes about ex-husband Jonny Lee Miller; says they 'remain wonderful friends'
articles.description: Angelina Jolie, amidst her ongoing legal tussle with ex-husband Brad Pitt, has revealed a surprisingly warm friendship with her first husband, actor Jonny Lee Miller. The pair, who married thirty years ago after meeting on the set of 'Hackers', have remained close friends, even recently reuniting professionally after three decades. Jolie expressed happiness over their enduring bond, highlighting their shared connection as parents.

articles.title: 'Ghar ki murgi le aao': Arshad Warsi recalls wife Maria Goretti being considered for 'Munna Bhai MBBS'
articles.description: In an intriguing revelation, Arshad Warsi shared that his wife, Maria Goretti, was once considered for the role of Circuit's wife in 'Munna Bhai MBBS.' Director Rajkumar Hirani mentioned that a nurse from the film was ultimately selected for the character due to budget limitations. This tidbit coincides with Warsi's exciting lead-up to his new show, 'Pritam and Pedro.'

articles.title: 'Princess Diaries 3': Author Meg Cabot calls the new script ‘amazing’; says it has ‘a really fun idea’
articles.description: Great news for 'Princess Diaries' enthusiasts! The eagerly awaited screenplay for the third installment is finished and has received enthusiastic acclaim from the original author, Meg Cabot. Despite earlier hiccups in development, the project is back on track, with Anne Hathaway ready to don her tiara as Princess Mia once more. Fans can look forward to a sequel that promises to satisfy.

articles.title: Lock Upp 2: Akanksha Choudhary Says Splitsvilla 16 Allegations Affected Her Mental Health
articles.description: Akanksha revealed that she will not “over-prepare” herself for “Lock Upp: Sach ya Sazaa” as she did for her previous show.

articles.title: 'From' Season 4 Episode 10: When and where to watch, what to expect and more
articles.description: The highly anticipated finale of the supernatural thriller 'From' is set to air this Sunday, wrapping up its fourth season with episode 10. Viewers can expect shocking revelations about the nightmarish town's darkest secrets. Following last week's dramatic moment where the Man in Yellow's motives were unveiled, and Clara's shocking betrayal surfaced, Tabitha and Jade delve into the grim fate of the captured children.

articles.title: Quote of the day by Pablo Picasso: “I don’t say everything, but I paint everything”
articles.description: Pablo Picasso's famous quote, 'I don’t say everything, but I paint everything,' highlights art's power to convey unspoken emotions and complex perspectives. His revolutionary Cubist style, showcasing multiple viewpoints simultaneously, exemplifies this. The article suggests that for many, creative expression offers a vital outlet for feelings and identities that words alone cannot capture, revealing a profound inner life through visual form.

articles.title: Why Is Demon Slayer Infinity Castle NOT On OTT Even After A Year - Explained
articles.description: Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba – The Movie: Infinity Castle broke records in 2025. Even after a year, the film hasn't streamed on OTT platforms. Here's why it has been delayed.

articles.title: Just when you thought Maggi couldn't get any wilder, Pulse Candy entered the pan; internet says, ‘Maggi ke saath atyachar ho raha hai’
articles.description: A bizarre Maggi recipe featuring Pulse candies has taken the internet by storm, sparking widespread disbelief and amusement. The viral video shows the candies being melted with milk, then combined with Maggi noodles and masala. Online reactions range from humorous comparisons to strong disapproval, with many questioning the culinary logic behind this unusual creation. The dish has certainly ignited a fresh debate about food experimentation.

articles.title: Tom Hardy to release rap album in August amid 'MobLand' controversy
articles.description: Tom Hardy is making waves in the music industry with his upcoming rap album, 'Czarface Meets Frankie Pulitzer,' releasing on August 28. This project showcases his alter ego Face Puller and includes appearances from hip-hop icons Busta Rhymes and Method Man. The announcement comes amid speculation regarding Hardy's rumored departure from the series 'MobLand' due to issues on set.

articles.title: 'Ananthan Kaadu' BO day 2: Arya's film registers 52.3% growth
articles.description: Arya's political action thriller, 'Ananthan Kaadu', saw a significant 52.3% surge in box office collections on its second day, raking in Rs 99 lakhs net. The film's total India net collection has now crossed Rs 1.64 crore. Despite a slight dip in overall occupancy, a wider release and strong performances, particularly from the Malayalam version, indicate a promising start for the movie.

articles.title: Trevor Nelson steps back from work over health concerns
articles.description: Trevor Nelson, the beloved veteran broadcaster, has announced a brief hiatus from his radio shows due to health issues after undergoing routine medical check-ups. The 62-year-old, known for advocating black music for over three decades, took to Instagram to inform fans about his focus on recovery. Prominent figures in the music industry, including Lauren Laverne and Beverley Knight, have rallied behind him with heartfelt messages of support during this time.

articles.title: 'Supergirl' opens to Rs 1.40 cr amid 'Welcome to the Jungle' clash
articles.description: Supergirl's Indian debut saw a modest opening, collecting Rs 1.40 crore net on its first day. The English version led the collections, while Hindi, Tamil, and Telugu releases followed. The film faced strong competition from Akshay Kumar's 'Welcome To The Jungle,' which had a significantly larger opening. Globally, 'Supergirl' had a more promising start, earning USD 13 million on its opening day.

articles.title: Main Vaapas Aaunga Day 15: Diljit's film crosses Rs 58 cr worldwide
articles.description: Imtiaz Ali’s romantic drama 'Main Vaapas Aaunga' has hit a remarkable box office mark, crossing Rs 50 crore in domestic revenue. After a lukewarm start, the audience's enthusiasm for the partition-themed narrative led to a net earning of Rs 37.65 crore in India, amassing a total of Rs 58.65 crore globally by day 15. Now in its third week, the film faces fresh competition from new releases.

articles.title: "That changed everything...": Gisele Bündchen breaks silence on the life she shared with Tom Brady after snubbing him on Father's Day
articles.description: Tom Brady and Gisele Bundchen marriage continues to dominate headlines even though it has been close to four years since they divorced one another and moved on in their lives. While Gisele Bundchen recently sparked outrage as she snubbed Tom Brady on Father’s Day, the Brazilian supermodel has now reflected on the life she shared with the NFL legend.

articles.title: 'Stranger Things' stars Millie-David to REUNITE for next
articles.description: Millie Bobby Brown and David Harbour are reuniting for a new Netflix series, playing estranged father and daughter. Harbour portrays a disgraced FBI agent pulled back into the field when his daughter, also an agent, vanishes. This marks their second on-screen father-daughter pairing after their iconic roles in 'Stranger Things'. Both actors are executive producers on the project, which Harbour described as a "simple rupture-and-repair thing" following past speculation.

articles.title: "My body failed": Dwyane Wade's wife Gabrielle Union breaks silence on the emotional toll of fertility issues
articles.description: Dwyane Wade and his wife, the renowned actress Gabrielle Union, seem to have build a perfect lives for themselves and their only daughter together, Kaavia Wade, after she was born in 2018. While Gabrielle Union has earned millions through her successful career in Hollywood, it seems the popular actress continues to suffer in silence for the pain that fertility issues had caused.

articles.title: Abhishek and Karisma's wedding was called off over prenuptial agreement
articles.description: Abhishek Bachchan and Karisma Kapoor's broken engagement continues to remain one of Bollywood's most talked-about relationships. While neither the Bachchan nor the Kapoor family has ever officially confirmed the exact reason behind the split, senior journalist Jyothi Venkatesh has now shared what he claims was one of the major factors behind the wedding being called off.

articles.title: Weekly Horoscope for ♉ TAURUS (June 27 - July 3, 2026): A Major Reward Could Arrive Just When You Need It Most
articles.description: Taurus Weekly Horoscope (27th June 2026 to 3rd July 2026): Taurus, this week brings a reassuring sense of progress and emotional stability. Many of the efforts you have been making quietly behind the scenes are now beginning to show positive results. You may notice that situations which previously felt uncertain are becoming clearer and easier to manage. This is a week where your natural patience becomes one of your greatest strengths. Instead of feeling pressured to rush, you are encouraged to trust your own pace. The universe reminds you that lasting success is built slowly, and your consistent efforts are creating a strong foundation for future growth. Discover what Sandeep Agarwal of Meditate Wisdom reveals in this weekly horoscope for taurus, offering in-depth insights aligned with this taurus weekly horoscope.

articles.title: SS Rajamouli French Retrospective Planned; Screenings To Carry First Look At Varanasi And Animated Baahubali Film
articles.description: For the next week, filmmaker SS Rajamouli will be touring France and screening his biggest hits in Telugu. Ahead of the films, fans will also get a first glimpse at his upcoming projects Varanasi and Baahubali: The Eternal War.

articles.title: Weekly Horoscope for ♈ ARIES (June 27 - July 3, 2026): Unexpected News Could Accelerate Your Goals This Week
articles.description: Aries Weekly Horoscope (27th June 2026 to 3rd July 2026): Aries, this week brings renewed enthusiasm, stronger motivation, and opportunities to make noticeable progress. You may feel a growing desire to take control of situations that have been developing slowly. The difference now is that your actions are supported by greater wisdom and experience. Instead of rushing ahead impulsively, you are beginning to understand the value of timing and preparation. This creates a powerful combination that helps you achieve better results. The week encourages you to trust your instincts while remaining patient enough to allow opportunities to unfold naturally. Explore what Sandeep Agarwal of Meditate Wisdom predicts in this weekly horoscope for aries, offering insights into balance, strategy, and resilience through this detailed aries weekly horoscope.

articles.title: "She was heartbroken": Taylor Swift and Blake Lively's bond reportedly changed as the pop star planned her life with Travis Kelce
articles.description: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce are reportedly tying the knot next week and all eyes are on whether the high profile couple are inviting popular Hollywood actress Blake Lively to their wedding which is happening in New York. Though Blake Lively has disappeared from the public eye, it seems Taylor Swift’s bond with her really suffered in the last few months.

articles.title: Quote of the day by British-American theoretical physicist Freeman Dyson: "We must be careful not to discourage our twelve-year-olds by..."
articles.description: Renowned physicist Freeman Dyson cautioned against excessive exam preparation stifling children's natural curiosity. He argued that focusing solely on tests at a young age, particularly around twelve, can extinguish the joy of learning. Dyson believed fostering a love for exploration and unstructured discovery is crucial for developing genuine thinkers, rather than just proficient test-takers. His perspective highlights the hidden cost of prioritizing grades over intellectual wonder.
